steps.title: Apply the enable pattern
steps.content: In Standard English, enable follows the pattern enable + object + to + base verb. Here, "cartographers" is the object, so the blank must supply a to-infinitive before "maps."

steps.title: Check the verb form
steps.content: A leaves out the required "to," C uses a participle, and D uses a past participle. Each produces an ungrammatical phrase after "enables cartographers." The answer is B.
